findings.description: Raw RST `:java:extdoc:` markup is preserved verbatim in the section text instead of being converted to plain readable text. Knowledge files should present clean prose for AI consumption, not RST-specific cross-reference syntax.
findings.source_evidence: Source uses RST directive: `:java:extdoc:`messagingProvider <nablarch.fw.messaging.handler.MessagingContextHandler.setMessagingProvider(nablarch.fw.messaging.MessagingProvider)>`` and `:java:extdoc:`MessagingProvider <nablarch.fw.messaging.MessagingProvider>`` — these should be rendered as plain class/property name references in the knowledge file.

findings.description: The fully-qualified class name `nablarch.fw.messaging.MessagingProvider` is missing from s4 hints. The short form `MessagingProvider` is present, but the fully-qualified form is referenced in the source and is included for the sibling class `nablarch.fw.messaging.provider.JmsMessagingProvider`, making the omission inconsistent.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `:java:extdoc:`MessagingProvider <nablarch.fw.messaging.MessagingProvider>`` — fully-qualified name `nablarch.fw.messaging.MessagingProvider` appears explicitly in the source but is absent from hints while `nablarch.fw.messaging.provider.JmsMessagingProvider` is included.
